query:
SELECT pv.id, pv.variantCode, pv.variantName,
       pb.id as box_id, pb.length, pb.width, pb.height, pb.cbm, pb.grossWeight, pb.netWeight
FROM product_variants pv
LEFT JOIN package_boxes pb ON pb.variantId = pv.id
WHERE pv.variantCode = 'DC-001-GRY-V033';
command:

FROM product_variants pv
LEFT JOIN package_boxes pb ON pb.variantId = pv.id
WHERE pv.variantCode = 'DC-001-GRY-V033';
